title: Warm up
content: The slide features images representing Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou with visual elements related to urban life and technology.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide introduces the theme of exploring modern China through its cities and the evolution of the nation.
key_claims: Exploration of China's evolution through cities

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide outlines a session focused on connecting local features with development strategies and their outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide links each city to their specific development strategies: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide illustrates how cities have different development strategies influenced by local conditions. It emphasizes how each strategy promotes city development.
